description: Likely the bottom of one of a dār/commercial receipt (see tag). Involves the qāḍī Abū […] al-Fārisī, and the Judaeo-Arabic note on verso describes it as ‘the ruqʿa of al-Fārisī’ then mentions brazilwood and sums of money. On verso there is also a rubbed out earlier Arabic document, probably unrelated.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
